title: Add active reference dataset assignment to Score
description:
## Summary
Add a score-owned pointer such as `referenceDataSetId` so each score can name its active deterministic regression dataset.

## Deliverables
- Make the score-owned reference dataset pointer the authoritative active reference.
- Expose it through client models, dashboard utilities, and MCP/API surfaces as needed.
- Keep active-reference selection on `Score`, not on `DataSet`.
